meta.title: MYCODELAB
meta.subtitle: Computational Physics Code Library
meta.description: A curated archive of numerical methods, computational algorithms, and scientific tools — built by physics students, for everyone.

contributors.name: Abhineet Srivastava
contributors.focus: Numerical Methods · Root Finding · Linear Algebra
contributors.bio: MSc Physics student specialising in numerical methods and computational algorithms. Primary maintainer of Root Finding and Linear Algebra modules.

contributors.name: Agnik Senroy
contributors.bio: MSc Physics student focusing on computational simulations and data analysis. Primary maintainer of Data Analysis and Numerical Simulations modules.

contributors.name: Ruru Thakur
contributors.focus: Computational Physics · Theoretical Methods · Advanced Simulations
contributors.bio: PhD scholar at the University of Sussex specialising in computational and theoretical physics. Contributing advanced simulation methods and theoretical algorithm implementations.

categories.title: Root Finding
categories.description: Numerical methods for locating roots of equations. Covers bracketing methods (Bisection, Regula Falsi) and open methods (Newton-Raphson, Secant, Fixed-Point Iteration).

projects.title: Bisection Method
projects.description: Robust bracketing algorithm that halves the search interval at each step. Guaranteed convergence for continuous functions with a sign change.

projects.title: Fixed Point Iteration
projects.description: Reformulates f(x)=0 as x=g(x) and iterates from an initial guess. Converges when |g'(x*)| < 1 near the root.

projects.title: Newton-Raphson Method
projects.description: Uses function value and derivative to achieve quadratic convergence. The fastest single-root method when a good initial guess is available.

projects.title: Regula Falsi Method
projects.description: Method of false position. Combines the guaranteed convergence of bisection with linear interpolation for faster approach to the root.

projects.title: Secant Method
projects.description: Approximates the derivative using a secant line through two prior iterates. Near-quadratic convergence without requiring explicit derivative computation.

categories.title: System of Linear Equations
categories.description: Direct and iterative solvers for systems of the form Ax = b. Includes Gaussian elimination variants and LU matrix factorisation.

projects.title: Gauss Elimination
projects.description: Row reduction method that transforms the augmented matrix [A|b] to upper triangular form, then solves via back substitution.

projects.title: Gauss-Jordan Method
projects.description: Extended Gaussian elimination that reduces the augmented matrix to reduced row echelon form, yielding the solution directly.

projects.title: Gauss-Seidel Method
projects.description: Iterative solver that updates each variable using the most recently computed values. Useful for large sparse systems.

projects.title: LU Decomposition
projects.description: Factorises matrix A into lower and upper triangular matrices. Efficient for solving multiple right-hand sides with the same coefficient matrix.

categories.title: Numerical Integration
categories.description: Quadrature methods for approximating definite integrals. Includes Newton-Cotes formulas and Gaussian quadrature.

categories.title: Differentiation
categories.description: Numerical differentiation using finite difference methods. Forward, backward, and central difference approximations.

categories.title: Linear Algebra
categories.description: Matrix operations, eigenvalue problems, singular value decomposition, and numerical linear algebra algorithms.

categories.title: Ordinary Differential Equations
categories.description: Initial value problem solvers including Euler, Runge-Kutta, and adaptive methods. Boundary value problem solvers.

categories.title: Fourier Methods
categories.description: Discrete Fourier transform, Fast Fourier Transform, power spectral density, and signal analysis techniques.

categories.title: Data Analysis
categories.description: Statistical analysis, curve fitting, regression, error analysis, and data processing for experimental physics data.

categories.title: Numerical Simulations
categories.description: Physics simulations including N-body dynamics, Monte Carlo methods, molecular dynamics, and stochastic processes.
